mapper.sql: OrderNo, ItemNo, id, CustomerNo, CstmName, DlvAddress, ContactPsn, TelNo, PostCode, IDCard, DlvFlag, CreateTime, UpdateTime, CreateUser, UpdateUser, Province, City, District, CarrierId, email
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.OrderDlvData
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.OrderDlvData (OrderNo, ItemNo, id, CustomerNo, CstmName, DlvAddress, ContactPsn, TelNo, PostCode, IDCard, DlvFlag, CreateTime, UpdateTime, CreateUser, UpdateUser, Province, City, District, CarrierId, email) values (#{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{dlvaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{telno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idcard,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{dlvflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{district,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{carrierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo.OrderDlvData
OrderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ItemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CstmName = #{record.cstmname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DlvAddress = #{record.dlvaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TelNo = #{record.telno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PostCode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IDCard = #{record.idcard,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DlvFlag = #{record.dlvflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CreateUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Province = #{record.province,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
City = #{record.city,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
District = #{record.district,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CarrierId = #{record.carrierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.OrderDlvData set OrderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ItemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CstmName = #{record.cstmname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DlvAddress = #{record.dlvaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, TelNo = #{record.telno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PostCode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IDCard = #{record.idcard,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DlvFlag = #{record.dlvflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CreateUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Province = #{record.province,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, City = #{record.city,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, District = #{record.district,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, CarrierId = #{record.carrierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.OrderDlvData
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CstmName = #{cstmname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DlvAddress = #{dlvaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ContactPsn = #{contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TelNo = #{telno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PostCode = #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IDCard = #{idcard,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DlvFlag = #{dlvflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
CreateTime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UpdateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CreateUser = #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateUser = #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Province = #{province,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
City = #{city,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
District = #{district,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CarrierId = #{carrierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where OrderNo = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ItemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.OrderDlvData set id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CstmName = #{cstmname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DlvAddress = #{dlvaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ContactPsn = #{contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, TelNo = #{telno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PostCode = #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IDCard = #{idcard,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DlvFlag = #{dlvflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, CreateTime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UpdateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CreateUser = #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdateUser = #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Province = #{province,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, City = #{city,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, District = #{district,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, CarrierId = #{carrierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where OrderNo = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ItemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}
